title: Ordinary Portland Cement, 33 Grade — Specification
scope: Requirements for 33 grade ordinary portland cement including chemical composition, physical requirements, and testing methods
scope_detail: This standard covers requirements of 33 grade ordinary Portland cement used for general civil engineering construction work.

title: Ordinary Portland Cement, 43 Grade — Specification
scope: Requirements for 43 grade ordinary portland cement
scope_detail: This standard covers requirements of 43 grade ordinary Portland cement.

title: Ordinary Portland Cement, 53 Grade — Specification
scope: Requirements for 53 grade ordinary portland cement for high strength applications
scope_detail: This standard covers requirements of 53 grade ordinary Portland cement for high strength applications.

title: Portland Slag Cement — Specification
scope: Requirements for Portland slag cement, covering composition, chemical and physical requirements
scope_detail: This standard covers requirements for Portland slag cement obtained by intergrinding Portland cement clinker with granulated slag.

title: Portland Pozzolana Cement — Specification: Part 1 Fly Ash Based
scope: Requirements for fly ash based Portland pozzolana cement
scope_detail: This standard covers fly ash based Portland pozzolana cement.

title: Portland Pozzolana Cement — Specification: Part 2 Calcined Clay Based
scope: Requirements for calcined clay based Portland pozzolana cement
scope_detail: This standard covers calcined clay based Portland pozzolana cement.

title: Masonry Cement — Specification
scope: Requirements for masonry cement used in mortar for masonry work, not intended for structural concrete
scope_detail: This standard covers masonry cement for general purposes where mortars for masonry are required but not intended for structural concrete.

title: High Alumina Cement for Structural Use — Specification
scope: Requirements for high alumina cement for structural applications
scope_detail: This standard covers high alumina cement for structural use.

title: Supersulphated Cement — Specification
scope: Requirements for supersulphated cement particularly suitable for marine works, aggressive water conditions
scope_detail: This standard covers composition, manufacture, and testing of supersulphated cement for marine works or aggressive water conditions.

title: White Portland Cement — Specification
scope: Requirements for white portland cement for architectural and decorative purposes
scope_detail: This standard covers white Portland cement for architectural and decorative purposes.

title: Hydrophobic Portland Cement — Specification
scope: Requirements for hydrophobic Portland cement for use in areas of high humidity
scope_detail: This standard covers hydrophobic Portland cement.

title: Sulphate Resisting Portland Cement — Specification
scope: Requirements for sulphate resisting Portland cement for use in sulphate bearing soils and groundwater
scope_detail: This standard covers sulphate resisting Portland cement.

title: Rapid Hardening Portland Cement — Specification
scope: Requirements for rapid hardening Portland cement for early strength gain
scope_detail: This standard covers rapid hardening Portland cement.

title: Coarse and Fine Aggregates from Natural Sources for Concrete — Specification
scope: Requirements for coarse and fine aggregates from natural sources for use in concrete
scope_detail: This standard covers coarse and fine aggregates from natural sources for use in concrete.

title: Sand for Masonry Mortars — Specification
scope: Requirements for sand used in masonry mortars
scope_detail: This standard covers sand for masonry mortars.

title: Artificial Lightweight Aggregates for Concrete Masonry Units — Specification
scope: Requirements for artificial lightweight aggregates used in concrete masonry units
scope_detail: This standard covers artificial lightweight aggregates for concrete masonry units.

title: Plain and Reinforced Concrete — Code of Practice
scope: Code of practice for plain and reinforced concrete including design and construction
scope_detail: This code covers plain and reinforced concrete for general building construction.

title: Guidelines for Concrete Mix Design
scope: Guidelines for concrete mix proportioning and design
scope_detail: This standard gives guidelines for concrete mix design including proportioning.

title: Precast Concrete Pipes (with and without Reinforcement) — Specification
scope: Requirements for precast concrete pipes with and without reinforcement for water mains and drainage
scope_detail: This standard covers precast concrete pipes both with and without reinforcement for water mains.

title: Concrete Masonry Units: Part 1 Hollow and Solid Concrete Blocks
scope: Requirements for hollow and solid concrete masonry blocks
scope_detail: This standard covers hollow and solid concrete masonry blocks.

title: Concrete Masonry Units: Part 2 Hollow and Solid Lightweight Concrete Blocks
scope: Requirements for hollow and solid lightweight concrete masonry blocks including dimensions and physical requirements
scope_detail: This standard covers hollow and solid lightweight concrete masonry blocks dimensions and physical requirements.

title: Concrete Masonry Units: Part 3 Autoclaved Cellular Aerated Concrete Blocks
scope: Requirements for autoclaved cellular aerated concrete blocks
scope_detail: This standard covers autoclaved cellular aerated concrete blocks.

title: Precast Concrete Blocks for Paving — Specification
scope: Requirements for precast concrete paving blocks
scope_detail: This standard covers precast concrete blocks for paving.

scope: Requirements for asbestos cement pressure pipes for water supply and drainage
scope_detail: This standard covers asbestos cement pressure pipes and specials.

scope: Requirements for precast concrete drainage pipes
scope_detail: This standard covers precast concrete drainage pipes.

title: Precast Concrete Manhole Cover and Frame — Specification
scope: Requirements for precast concrete manhole covers and frames
scope_detail: This standard covers precast concrete manhole covers and frames.

title: Precast Concrete Kerbs — Specification
scope: Requirements for precast concrete kerbs for road and pavement edges
scope_detail: This standard covers precast concrete kerbs.

scope_detail: This standard covers asbestos cement building boards.

scope_detail: This standard covers dimensions of corrugated asbestos cement sheets.

scope_detail: This standard covers mild steel bars used as concrete reinforcement.

scope: Requirements for hot rolled structural steel for general structural purposes
scope_detail: This standard covers hot rolled medium and high tensile structural steel.
